name: Submit stack with quality PR descriptions
query: Submit all branches in my stack as PRs
setup_commands: # Assume a stack already exists with 2-3 branches
expected_behavior: Runs 'stackit log' to see which branches will be submitted
- Checks PR template from .github/pull_request_template.md if exists
- Checks project conventions from CONTRIBUTING.md/README.md if exists
- Generates title from first commit subject (under 72 chars)
- Generates body with summary bullets and test plan
anti_patterns: Creates PRs with placeholder content ('TODO', 'TBD', etc.)
Submits without checking for project templates/conventions
